author: y4rr
content: Fixture regeneration needed: encoder_layer_forward and decoder_layer_forward_with_memory fixture items must use keys matching the test's extract calls: weight_q_proj, weight_k_proj, weight_v_proj, weight_out_proj (not attn_q_proj etc.). Also need ffn_w3 for the SwiGLU third gate weight. cascade_skip::ENCODER_DECODER_FIXTURE_KEY_MISMATCH must be flipped to false once done.
